bolt.directive: Maintain the current performance baseline. Defer any new optimization tasks until pending architectural shifts and validation debts are resolved.

palette.directive: Execute the pending validation task. Thoroughly verify that journal logs are consistently clear and highly accessible for strictly sandboxed services (neos-autoupdate.service, neos-liveuser-setup.service). Ensure the recent permission restrictions do not degrade debugging capabilities.

sentinel.directive: Execute the pending validation task. Conduct a rigorous audit of the systemd sandboxing configurations in neos-autoupdate.service and neos-liveuser-setup.service. Ensure zero unnecessary privileges are granted, and thoroughly validate that ReadWritePaths directives remain strictly minimal and fit for purpose.

note: Immediate directives mandated by the No-build day (strategic pause) to aggressively clear accumulating validation debt from the newly applied strict sandboxing.
